findings.evidence: Line 70 is exactly `⟨hreg.1, hp.continuous, hp.isOpenMap⟩`; Mathlib has `IsCoveringMap.continuous`, `IsCoveringMap.isOpenMap`, and `IsCoveringMap.isQuotientMap (hf' : Function.Surjective f)` in `Mathlib/Topology/Covering/Basic.lean`, while `IsOpenQuotientMap` is just surjective/continuous/open.
findings.fix: Prove the general theorem first, e.g. `theorem IsCoveringMap.isOpenQuotientMap (hp : IsCoveringMap p) (hsurj : Function.Surjective p) : IsOpenQuotientMap p := ⟨hsurj, hp.continuous, hp.isOpenMap⟩`, and derive the regular corollary from it if desired.
findings.issue: `IsRegular.isOpenQuotientMap` assumes `IsRegular p`, but the proof uses only `hreg.1` as surjectivity; deck regularity is unrelated to `IsOpenQuotientMap`.

summary: The quotient-covering statements sit at the expected level, but the new open quotient corollary keeps an irrelevant regularity hypothesis instead of exposing the natural surjective-covering result.
